scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n PORTAL,PRODUCT,SENSORY,SHELF,QA -c cyan,blue,yellow,magenta,green "node scripts/run-project.mjs FoodLab_AI_Portal dev 5173" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Product_Development_AI dev 5174" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Sensory_AI dev 5175" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Shelf_Life_Predictor dev 5176" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_QA_Dashboard dev 5177"
scripts.build:all: concurrently -n PORTAL,PRODUCT,SENSORY,SHELF,QA "node scripts/run-project.mjs FoodLab_AI_Portal build" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Product_Development_AI build" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Sensory_AI build" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Shelf_Life_Predictor build" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_QA_Dashboard build"
scripts.test:all: concurrently -n CONTRACTS,PORTAL,PRODUCT,SENSORY,SHELF,QA "node scripts/validate-phase2-contracts.mjs" "node scripts/run-project.mjs FoodLab_AI_Portal test" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Product_Development_AI test" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Sensory_AI test" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_Shelf_Life_Predictor test" "node scripts/run-project.mjs Food_QA_Dashboard test"
